data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "v0.7.0 fully released across all four surfaces (PyPI 0.7.0, GitHub Release v0.7.0 Latest, Homebrew formula, MCP Registry 0.7.0 isLatest); smoke test passed. Force-closing because AC3 ('GitHub Release created automatically, not by hand') is not retroactively satisfiable: the dogfood surfaced a bug in the new github_release job (missing GH_REPO), so v0.7.0's release was created manually as a one-off (PyPI immutability blocks re-running the tag workflow). The fix merged as change 316 and will auto-create the release on the next tag (v0.7.1+). Left unsigned to accurately reflect that this one criterion was bypassed.". Session: f9e721e55.
